mainEntity.name: What role does E-E-A-T play in Perplexity for New York firms?
mainEntity.text: What role does E-E-A-T play in Perplexity for New York firms?

acceptedAnswer.text: E-E-A-T is crucial; New York firms need attorney bios, verdicts, and citations to authoritative sources for Perplexity trust.

suggestedAnswer.text: Display NY Bar numbers, publish op-eds, earn .edu links. Perplexity demotes low-E-E-A-T in regulated fields like law.

name: E-E-A-T for NY Perplexity Rankings
